description: End of a letter in the hand of Yefet b. Menashshe ha-Levi, probably to one of his brothers. Comprising greetings to various acquaintances. Mentioned are Sitt Naʿīm, Abū l-Ḥasan son of the judge (ben [ha] shofet), the European Sheʾaltiʾel (ben?) Yosef \'the interpreter\' (al-turgeman), and Naḥman. Verso is blank. Dating: first half of the 12th century.(Information in part from A. Franklin and S. D. Goitein, Mediterranean Society, 2:22, 315-6, 198, 213)
